/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/Mp3Player_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/miniaudio_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/core/PlaylistManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/core/AudioPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/core/TrackMetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/core/RingBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/models/FileBrowserModelFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/models/CustomSortProxyModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/Visualizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/InteractiveBackground.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/LeftWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/RightWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/BottomWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/src/ui/ThemeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mp3Player.dir/Mp3Player_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o Mp3Player  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 -lm -ldl -ltag -lz /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
